intro: Abiel (meaning father of God or pious) is the name of two men in the Old Testament. (1.) The son of Zeror and father of Ner, making him the great-grandfather of King Saul (1 Samuel 14:51; 1 Chronicles 8:33; 9:39). In 1 Samuel 9:1 he may be identified as the grandfather of Saul directly. (2.) One of David's thirty mighty men, an Arbathite (1 Chronicles 11:32), also called Abi-albon in 2 Samuel 23:31.
